chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 842 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objections. 2..For hearing of main case 04-10-2023 Mr. Muhammad Zohaib Azam, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sajjad Muhammad Zangejo, Advocate for respondents No.7&8. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘’Ada, D.A.G. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondents No.7&8 submits that this petition has served its purpose, as enquiry was conducted against the respondent No.14 and he has been awarded penalty of withdrawal of promotion for one year. A copy of enquiry, he has submitted along with statement dated 24.05.2021. Learned counsel for the petitioner is therefore satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Learned counsel for the petitioner is therefore satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-839 of 2021 Const. Petition No.D-3081 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MMA 3840/2021 3.For hearing of main case 04-10-2023 Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Faiz Muhammad Shar, Advocate for respondents No.5&6. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Kaleemullah Shar, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.65 in C.P.No.D-839 of 2021 and seeks time to file comments. Adjourned to 14.11.2023, when the Superintendent Engineer, Sukkur Barrage Left Bank, Sukkur shall be present in person to explain as to why encroachment on watercourses No. 60-R, 61-R and 66-R has not been removed despite directions of this Court as well as directions of the Supreme Court. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Spl. ATA. Acquittal Appeal No.D- 27 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of MA 1081/2022 3.For hearing of MA 796/2023. 4.For hearing of MA 756/2023 5.For hearing of main case 03-10-2023 Mr. Waqar Ahmed Phulpoto, Advocate for appellant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G. ***** 4. This application with the consent is allowed. Let R&Ps be sent back to the trial Court enabling the applicant/surety to seek return of the surety in accordance with law within 15-days. After which, the R&Ps shall be sent to this Court, as already ordered. Application is disposed of accordingly. 1to3&5, Adjourned to date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Application is disposed of accordingly. 1to3&5, Adjourned to date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR 1st Civil Appeal No.D-45 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 1323/2023 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 1324/2023 4.For orders on CMA 1325/2023 5.For hearing of main case 6.For orders on CMA 1326/2023 03-10-2023 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for appellant. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 2,4 to 6. Subject to point of limitation to be decided later on, let notices be issued to respondents for 16.11.2023. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Subject to point of limitation to be decided later on, let notices be issued to respondents for 16.11.2023. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.
